public_beat: Offline Cinder Span vertical-slice playtest pending dated build/session evidence

stages.outcome: Stage 1 exit is blocked: G1 failed content traceability, G6 is not run, and G7 has only partial repeat evidence.
risks: G1 trace failure, G6 missing session evidence, and G7 repeat evidence block exit

stages.outcome: Stage 2 exit is not assessed: G2 and G5 are not run, while G8 scoring remains pending.
risks: G2 lacks full mechanics, matchup, TTK, and reward-combo coverage

stages.outcome: Stage 3 exit is deferred: final G1, G4, and G6 evidence is not run.
risks: G4 structured immersion sessions not run
G1 full content audit not run

gates.measured_value: lore-violation count: not-run; trace coverage: failed because player-visible source has no AS-WV/inventory_id trace metadata

gates.threshold: 100% mechanics; win rates 45–55%; TTK ±15%; no combo >1.3× median EV
gates.measured_value: casual legal walker 55.0% (110/200) and selected-combo maximum/median 1.118571x; full mechanics, matchup, TTK, and reward-combo coverage not-run
gates.measurement_method: deterministic simulator reconciliation; incomplete coverage is not a gate pass

gates.measured_value: 4/5 archetypes complete with distinct sequences/outcomes; rusher 0% as intentional lesson; casual branch census 0.67-0.89

gates.threshold: median ≥4/5; feedback ≤100 ms; 0 unresolved S1/S2 readability
gates.measured_value: not-run; no structured immersion sessions, feedback timing capture, or readability audit are attached

gates.threshold: paid/free delta ≤5 pp; reversal ≤30%; free parity 10–20 sessions
gates.measured_value: not-run; no revenue surface or fairness cohort evidence is attached

gates.threshold: telemetry, rollback, checklist; p95 ≤16.7 ms; long frames <0.5%; 30-min stable; input ≤100 ms
gates.measured_value: not-run; no instrumented browser/mobile session is attached
live stage clears 7.1/8.8/9.3s at bot pace (9-17 act/stage; human-pace conversion in-band); reward 3/3; repeat proxy PARTIAL (restart verified, human sessions pending)
gates.measurement_method: live browser drivers (2 policies) + simulator proxy

gates.measured_value: not-run; the frequency matrix and impression scoring are pending

unresolved_risks.description: G1 traceability failed: player-visible content has no AS-WV/inventory_id trace metadata, and the violation audit is absent.
unresolved_risks.mitigation: Attach a complete player-visible inventory audit and resolve every trace violation before any G1 pass.

unresolved_risks.description: G2 is not run: no full mechanics/matchup coverage, elapsed-time TTK measurement, or all-reward-pair combo evaluation is attached.
unresolved_risks.mitigation: Produce the missing coverage matrix, timed sessions, and complete reward-pair simulation evidence.

unresolved_risks.description: G6 lacks an instrumented browser/mobile session and G7 lacks voluntary human repeat evidence.
unresolved_risks.mitigation: Run the required local browser/mobile and voluntary-session evidence before reassessing exit gates.
